title: New Collection with American Crafts - Late Afternoon!
excerpt: I’m so excited to announce my latest collection with American Crafts - Late Afternoon ( Click here to shop )! I love the warm, earthy colors of this collection. Along with the all the goodies you’ve come to love -…
body:
I’m so excited to announce my latest collection with American Crafts - Late Afternoon (Click here to shop)! I love the warm, earthy colors of this collection.

Along with the all the goodies you’ve come to love - patterned paper, embossed puffy stickers, washi tape and alphabet thickers - there’s also some new items like an old-school stencil ruler (who remembers these growing up?) and calendar washi tape!

I can’t wait to see you all create with the products in this collection!

Leave me a comment about which product you’re most excited about.
Shop the entire collection here!

Shop Late Afternoon
